project.project_name: Seahorse Offshore Wind Farm GP Survey

comments.comment_text:
Please amend ITP with following inspection points for Client : W for all points except for section 4 which is a R and step 1 which is a H point

Add a step for the provision of final as built documentation (R for Client)
comments.summary_ko: amend ITP with following inspection points for Client : W for all points except ... 검토 및 수정 필요.

comments.comment_text: Definitions of H / W / R to be reviewed. For W points, Geowview does not need to wait for Client, Geoview shall inform in writing the Client. For H point, Geoview shall notify and not proceed to the next step if no confirmation has been provided by Client

comments.comment_text: In column "acceptance standard", put the correct identification of project document / specification.
